commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a bundled Vault SecretRef plugin, Vault CLI setup/status helpers, Vault docs and inventory entries, labeler coverage, and `secrets apply` support for activating plugin-managed exec providers.

PR surface: Source +702, Tests +405, Docs +282, Config +21, Other +6. Total +1416 across 18 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding: current-head GitHub check annotations show `src/secrets/apply.test.ts` failing because the new fixture config is invalid. I did not run tests locally because this was a read-only review.
